notes:
batch-C: crates/ai/src/agent/action/mod.rs, 54 entries.

Split by sink:
- 25 entries from `user_friendly_name()` (lines 393-433): user-facing labels flowing into `ConversationStatus::Blocked { blocked_action }` → notification body in agent_management_model.rs and StartAgent error in start_agent.rs. Translated as UI text.
- 29 entries from `Display for AIAgentActionType` (lines 450-614) and Display impls for ReadFilesRequest/UploadArtifactRequest/SearchCodebaseRequest (lines 681/693/712): PascalCase debug-style format strings with `{:?}` debug specifiers (`RequestCommandOutput:`, `ReadMCPResource:`, `Grep:`, `FileGlob:`, etc.). These are dev-facing log payloads, never rendered in UI surfaces. Flagged as telemetry_payload.

Terminology decisions (consistent with action_result/mod.rs sister file already translated in batch-B):
- `MCP` brand kept English; `MCP resource/tool` → `MCP 资源/工具`.
- `Shell command` → `Shell 命令` (Shell capitalized as brand-like identifier, consistent with system convention).
- `agent` → `Agent` (per glossary, do_not_translate).
- `Orchestrate {} agent(s)` → `协调 {} 个 Agent` (verb form, per PRD glossary candidate).
- `Send message: {subject}` → `发送消息：{subject}` (full-width colon between Chinese context and placeholder).
- `Use computer` / `Request computer use` → `使用电脑` / `请求使用电脑` (Anthropic computer-use terminology, keeping consistent with action_result sister translations).
- `Read skill` → `读取 Skill` (Skill kept as Claude/Anthropic feature term).
- `Ask user N question(s)` → `向用户提出 N 个问题` (Chinese has no plural marker; drop `(s)` distinction).
- `Insert N code review comments` → `插入 N 条代码审查评论` (量词 `条` for comments).
- `Init project` → `初始化项目` (verb form matching peer labels like `Read documents`).
- `Fetch conversation` → `获取会话` (vs `加载会话/load` — fetch implies remote retrieval).
- `Transfer shell command control to user` → `将 Shell 命令控制权转交给用户` (`transfer` → `转交` per glossary handoff family).

No doc-comments, no panic strings, no test fixtures, no wgpu labels, no search_terms entries in this batch.

Counts: translate=25, flag_telemetry_payload=29, total=54.
